nasb.text: Moreover, he made the laver of bronze with its base of bronze, from the mirrors of the serving women who served at the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: He made the basin of bronze and its stand of bronze, from the mirrors of the ministering women who ministered in the entrance of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 他用銅做洗濯盆，又用銅做盆座，是用那些在會幕門口服事的婦女的銅鏡做成的。

ccb.text: 他用在会幕门口服侍的妇女们的铜镜造铜盆和盆座。
